component.name: Skeleton
component.description: Animated placeholder for content that is loading.

useCases: Placeholder for text blocks while data loads
Avatar and image placeholders in loading states

commonPatterns.name: text-skeleton
commonPatterns.description: Placeholder for a line of text

commonPatterns.name: card-skeleton
commonPatterns.description: Loading placeholder mimicking a card layout

commonPatterns.name: image-skeleton
commonPatterns.description: Placeholder for an image or media area

antiPatterns.reason: Skeleton implies loading is in progress, not that it has failed
antiPatterns.alternative: Show an error message or empty state component

antiPatterns.reason: Without width and height the skeleton collapses to zero size
antiPatterns.alternative: Always set width and height via className to match the content it replaces

antiPatterns.scenario: Showing skeletons indefinitely without a timeout
antiPatterns.reason: Endless pulse animations frustrate users if loading stalls
antiPatterns.alternative: Add a timeout that transitions to an error or retry state

responsive.mobile: Matches the layout of the content it replaces
responsive.desktop: Matches the layout of the content it replaces

accessibility.screenReader: Not announced — use aria-busy on the parent container or a live region for loading announcements

rules: Always set explicit dimensions via className to match the content being replaced
Use rounded-full for circular skeletons (avatar placeholders)
Pair with aria-busy on the parent container for accessibility
Transition to an error state after a reasonable timeout

aiHints.context: Use as a content placeholder while data loads. Renders as a pulsing div with bg-accent. Always set width and height via className. For indeterminate loading without layout, use Spinner. Match the skeleton shape to the content it will replace.
